titleStmt.title: SII 39.246: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 246. (A.R. No. 246 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE PRĀKĀRA KRISHNADĒVA MAHĀRĀYA-ŚAKA 1435 (1513 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to some tax concession given by Ādiyappanāyakkar for the merit of his brother Chiṉṉappa nāyakkar to the people of Ēḻupaṟṟu nāḍu who had suffered due to heavy tax burden and left their villages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man śakābtam 1000 4 100 3 10 5 mel cellāniṉṟa śrīmuka camvata sarattu kumpa ṉāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu bhammadavādaśiyum
comavārattu puṇarpūcattu nāḷ śrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran kiṟuṭṭiṇateva makārāyar vācal Ātiyappa nāyakkar cakotaraṉ ciṉṉappa nāyakkar
nirupa paṭikku ciṉṉappa nāyakkar Ayyaṉ kāriyattukkuk kaṭavār viḷantai Uṭai taiyyalār patiṉeḻu paṟṟu nāṭṭavaṟku kal
veṭṭi kuṭuttapaṭi yinta cīrmaiyiṟai nerukkattiṉ melekuṭi kulaintu pokaiyil yinta nāṭṭukku niṉṟiṟai koḷḷa
niccayitta kaṭamai kāṇikkai kuṭimāṭu kāṇikkai puṟavari viniyokam maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa cakala Upātiyamaṇaiyaṅkāṭṭu
k kuttakaiyāka Irukkiṟa kuṭikku nañcaikku māttāl paṇam Irupatteṭṭum puñcacekku māttāl paṇam Irupattiraṇṭum koḷḷuppayaṟu kaṇpu coḷam
Iṟuṅku varaku Ivaiyiṟṟukku yitil Oṉṟu pāti Ākavum Inta cīrmaiyile poyvarukiṟa kuṭikku nañceykku māttāl paṇam Irupatum puñceykku
māttāl paṇam patiṉ Añcum puṟakkuṭi nañceykku māttāl paṇam patiṉ Añcum puñceykku māttāl paṇam pattum tampirāṉār
cipātatāṇaiyerāyar pātatāṇaiye Inta niṉṟayattile koḷḷak kaṭavom Ākavum Intak kalveṭṭu Aḻiccu Eṟakkoṇṭavaṉ
Uṇṭāṉāl taṉṉai rakṣicca cuvāmikku Iraṇṭu niṉaicca pāvattilum keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvai
koṉṟa pāpattile pokak kaṭavārkavum Ivai viḷaintai Uṭaittaiyyalār §
Digital edition of SII 39.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
